statusNote: Queue definition and structured intake contract only. No exchange findings, source records, claims, MI cells, or reports are created by this task. Each batch is separately owner-gated.

sourceDecisionRef.note: This queue inherits the frozen MIGRATION_4 disposition. If snapshotSourceSha256 or discrepancyJsonSha256 drifts, re-verify before any research import.

researchWaves.gate: Only after P0 owner review is complete

batchRule: Run one exchange per batch in the fixed order KZ-P0-A(bybit) -> KZ-P0-B(mexc) -> KZ-P0-C(okx) -> [owner review] -> KZ-P1-A(bitget) -> KZ-P1-B(kucoin) -> KZ-P1-C(bingx). Do not run all six as one uncontrolled batch.

exchangeResearchItems.researchObjective: Determine whether the future MI status should remain UNKNOWN or become AVAILABLE / AVAILABLE_WITH_LIMITS / RESTRICTED / CONFLICTING, with official Kazakhstan-specific evidence. Do not resolve in this task.
requiredClaims: accepted identity documents where officially stated
AFSA or other Kazakhstan regulatory evidence
exchangeResearchItems.liveVerificationPolicy: NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED unless established by official documentation; NO-PROXY (no VPN/residential proxy/local-IP simulation/registration/KYC submission).
exchangeResearchItems.completionCriteria: All required claims either evidenced by an official Tier A/B source with dates, or explicitly recorded as unresolved; global-vs-Kazakhstan offer eligibility distinguished; AFSA licence status recorded; owner review completed. Website accessibility alone is NOT sufficient.

exchangeResearchItems.researchObjective: Resolve or explicitly retain CONFLICTING for Kazakhstan, using tiered dated official sources for the regulator-versus-exchange conflict. Do not resolve in this task.
exchangeResearchItems.liveVerificationPolicy: NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED unless established by official documentation; NO-PROXY.
exchangeResearchItems.completionCriteria: The AFSA-warning-vs-terms conflict (cf-kz-mexc-terms-vs-regulator) is resolved with a decisive higher-tier official source, or explicitly retained as CONFLICTING with tiered dated provenance; owner review completed.

exchangeResearchItems.researchObjective: Resolve or explicitly retain CONFLICTING for Kazakhstan, using tiered dated official sources for the official-source conflict. Do not resolve in this task.
exchangeResearchItems.liveVerificationPolicy: NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED unless established by official documentation; NO-PROXY.
exchangeResearchItems.completionCriteria: The AFSA-warning-vs-terms conflict (cf-kz-okx-terms-vs-regulator) is resolved with a decisive higher-tier official source, or explicitly retained as CONFLICTING with tiered dated provenance; owner review completed.

exchangeResearchItems.researchObjective: Confirm or revise RESTRICTED for Kazakhstan and reconfirm freshness. No Kazakhstan CTA while restricted. Do not resolve in this task.
exchangeResearchItems.liveVerificationPolicy: NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED unless established by official documentation; NO-PROXY.
exchangeResearchItems.completionCriteria: The official Terms-of-Use Prohibited-Countries restriction is reconfirmed effective with source + effective date + checked date + next recheck date; scope (registration/KYC/products/fiat) recorded; unverified third-party P2P activity is explicitly distinguished from official terms and never overrides them.

exchangeResearchItems.researchObjective: Resolve UNKNOWN for Kazakhstan with official evidence. Agreement on UNKNOWN is not proof of availability. Do not resolve in this task.
exchangeResearchItems.liveVerificationPolicy: NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED unless established by official documentation; NO-PROXY.
exchangeResearchItems.completionCriteria: All required claims either evidenced by an official Tier A/B source with dates or explicitly recorded as unresolved; direct-fiat vs P2P distinguished; owner review completed. UNKNOWN is not promoted without official confirmation.

rules: Tier D cannot establish legal availability, registration eligibility, KYC eligibility or product permission.
News creates a review task, not a final decision.
A strictly higher tier is decisive over a lower tier; equal-tier official disagreement is retained as CONFLICTING.
Community/social establishes neither legality, availability, licensing, sanctions, restriction nor fees alone.

noProxyPrinciples: Website accessibility is not proof of availability.
IP country is not proof of legal residence.
When live verification is unavailable: liveVerificationState = NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED.
requiredSourceFieldsSchemaNote: Future source records should import into schemas/market-intelligence/market-source.schema.json. Field-name alignment: retrievalDate -> retrievedDate; publicationDate -> publishedDate; effectiveDate -> effectiveFrom; sourceType -> captureType (enum HTML|PDF|SCREENSHOT|API|DATASET|MANUAL_BROWSER|NEWS); supportedClaims -> productScope/quotedClaim/evidenceSummary; status enum ACTIVE|MOVED|REMOVED|SUPERSEDED|BLOCKED|STALE. Do not modify the committed schema.
publicationBlockerRule: A finding remains blocked when any critical claim lacks adequate evidence. Any single active blocker prevents MI-cell creation, ranking, CTA, promo, route, and Deep Passport publication.

migrationBoundary.note: Future research output must be reviewed and imported through a separate validated task.

nextTask: CBW-KZ-DEEP-RESEARCH-BATCH-KZ-P0-A-BYBIT-001 — owner-gated single-exchange Deep Research batch for Bybit x Kazakhstan only, returning the structured output package (research-run/source-registry/claim-ledger/exchange-country-findings/conflicts/unknowns/publication-blockers/research-report) under NO-PROXY rules, for owner review before KZ-P0-B (MEXC). No MI cell, ranking, CTA, route, page, translation, or MIGRATION_5 is authorized.
